ShortDescription.Value: Hide Notification icons, pick milestones, add/remove money, achievements.

Publish.LongDescription:
# City Watchdog (CWD)
City Watchdog is a redux and expansion for the old broken City Controller mod.
### Features
- Notification icon display/hide controls. - Change the MilesStone you start with. - Manual add/subtract money controls using hotkeys. - Automatic add money option. - Convert saves from Unlimited money to normal Limited money.
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord. If you like getting free mods, give a Like, easy way to show support :)
### Future - 6 languages supported, add more translations. - Recommended to use Achievement Fixer (AF) mod for now until I have time to merge it into this mod. Current achievement system in this mod are not as robust. will auto disable if it detects AF installed so no conflicts. - If anyone can make better Thumbnail and screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - mod author + maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for the original City Controller mod - Dorkington, Flightech - testers
